zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：区间震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于窄幅震荡偏弱格局，价格运行在1673均线下方，短线多头动能不足，市场缺乏明确突破方向，整体以区间整理为主。运行中短期观望

技术指标方面，MACD持续为负值显示空头动能占优，价格持续承压于20日均线1673附近，若无法站稳均线上方，反弹空间受限。

下方支撑关注1659一线及1655区域，上方阻力位于1673与1685附近，若跌破支撑可能延续回落结构。需警惕风险变化中

交易策略上建议维持区间高抛低吸思路，未放量突破前不宜追涨，激进者可在1659附近轻仓试多并严格止损，控制仓位并关注突破信号

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is consolidating around 1660 after a mild intraday drift lower. Price is trading slightly beneath the 20-period SMA at 1673, signaling short-term bearish pressure and a lack of sustained bullish momentum. Market structure remains compressed, with volatility narrowing and directional conviction fading. Despite the near-flat 24-hour change, sellers retain a modest edge as attempts to reclaim the moving average continue to fail. The broader short-term tone remains neutral-to-bearish.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. The MACD reading at -3.979 suggests downside pressure is still present, even if not accelerating sharply. With RSI unavailable, price behavior becomes the primary guide, and the repeated inability to push above 1670–1673 hints at distribution rather than accumulation. The position below the SMA(20) further confirms that rallies are being sold into, keeping upward momentum structurally weak and limiting bullish follow-through.

On the downside, immediate support is concentrated around 1659–1660, a level repeatedly tested during recent sessions. A decisive break below this zone would likely open room toward 1645, followed by deeper support near 1630 where prior demand emerged. On the upside, resistance is first seen at 1663, with stronger structural resistance at the 20-SMA near 1673. A break and hold above this moving average would be required to shift the short-term bias meaningfully upward.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor range-bound strategies between 1659 and 1673 until a clear breakout occurs. Fade strategies near resistance may be preferable, particularly on signs of rejection around 1668–1673, with stops placed just above the SMA. On the flip side, bullish setups require confirmation via a clean breakout and sustained hold above 1673. Until then, tight risk management remains essential given the market’s compressed volatility and lack of directional strength.
